WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY PETITIONER PANIN, VASILI IVAN AS TO RESPONDENT SUPERIOR COURT OF THE CITY & CO. OF SAN FRANCISCO

ELECTRONICALLY SERVED TO ALLISON MACBETH, OLIVER KROLL, AND ERIC FLEISCHAKER LETTER DATED 10-19-21. "YOUR CLIENT IS NAMED AS REAL PARTY IN INTEREST IN THE ABOVE-CAPTIONED WRIT PROCEEDING. THE APPELLATE DIVISION REQUESTS THAT YOU SERVE AND FILE OPPOSITION, IF ANY, TO THE PETITION ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 29, 2021. YOUR OPPOSITION MAY BE IN LETTER FORM. IF YOU ARE NOT FILING AN OPPOSITION, PLEASE INFORM THE APPELLATE DIVISION IN WRITING. PETITIONER MAY SERVE AND FILE AN OPTIONAL REPLY TO THE OPPOSITION ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 5, 2021."
